items.title: Add NOX Crypto Services — AI Content Writing & Smart Contract Audits
items.description:
Hi! I'd like to suggest adding a freelance crypto services listing.

**NOX Crypto Services** offers AI-powered content writing, smart contract documentation, whitepaper creation, and Telegram bot development for Web3 projects.

- Services: Whitepapers, blog posts, Twitter threads, smart contract docs, bot development
- Pricing: $15-$300 depending on service
- Accepts crypto payments (USDC/ETH on Base)
- Portfolio: https://t.me/NoxBaseBot (50+ command crypto bot)
- Details: https://gist.github.com/dayi1000/ff112d5f2319341c2eb08b28a40dd951

Thanks for considering!

items.title: Suggestion: jobsportal.fi
items.description:
Hi!

I would like to suggest adding [Jobsportal.fi](https://jobsportal.fi).  

It’s a job board focused on roles that can be done from Finland, including remote-friendly positions from Finnish and international companies.

Thanks for maintaining this list!
